home.header: Lcoin: A Free Platform for Students
home.header_text: Post assignments or help others. No commissions or intermediaries.
home.text_1: Describe what you need to be done and wait for offers.
home.text_2: Use the built-in chat to agree on terms and price.
home.text_3: Close the deal directly with the person you choose.

mainlayout.confirm_logout: Are you sure that you want to leave?

feedback.info_text: Found a bug or have an idea? Briefly describe the matter in a couple of sentences, and we'll look into it.
feedback.success_info: We're glad you're helping our service grow.

disputes.text_review: No disputes are currently under review

chats.empty_info: Start a conversation by visiting a user's profile through their order or search.

search_orders.help_text: and someone will surely help you

order_message.text_opponent_dispute: The order is now in dispute. Please go to the dispute chat

verify.pending_text: Photos under review. Expect confirmation within 24 hours.
verify.title: User verification
verify.step_1_desc: Please upload a clear photo of the front of your ISIC card as shown in the example.
verify.security_note: This is required for community security and identity verification.
verify.benefit_2: Your orders and bids will appear higher in the list

load.text_wait: Please wait a moment, they will appear shortly

error_message.price_abs: Price must be a positive whole number
error_message.term_abs: Term must be a positive whole number (at least 1 day)
error_message.review_max_char: The review must be a maximum of 100 characters
error_message.grade_condition: The rating must be between 1 and 5. We have set it to 5 by default.
error_message.order_approved: You cannot delete the order because it has already been approved
error_message.order_approved_bid: You cannot delete the bid because the order has already been approved
error_message.refresh_hint: Refresh the page or check the URL. If the issue persists, let us know — we're here to help!
error_message.invalid_type_file: Invalid file type. Only JPG and PNG are supported
error_message.not_allow_chat_myself: You cannot start a chat with yourself
error_message.not_allow: You are not authorized to perform this action
error_message.order_in_work: Order is already in progress or deleted
error_message.no_data: Data is missing or not entered
error_message.page_not_found_desc: It looks like we can't find what you're looking for. The address might have been changed or the page was deleted.
